entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `inciName` TEXT NOT NULL, `commonName` TEXT NOT NULL, `safetyTag` TEXT NOT NULL, `healthMechanism` TEXT NOT NULL, `affectedPopulation` TEXT NOT NULL, `doseThreshold` TEXT NOT NULL, `euStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, `usStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, `cnStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, `jpStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, `citationIds` TEXT NOT NULL, `confidence` REAL NOT NULL, `dataValidAsOf` TEXT NOT NULL)
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`inciName` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`ingredients`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_ingredients_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `ingredients` BEGIN DELETE FROM `ingredients_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_ingredients_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `ingredients` BEGIN DELETE FROM `ingredients_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_ingredients_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `ingredients` BEGIN INSERT INTO `ingredients_fts`(`docid`, `inciName`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`inciName`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_ingredients_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `ingredients` BEGIN INSERT INTO `ingredients_fts`(`docid`, `inciName`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`inciName`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '8ef41e6448fcdff23892038c8b2f19dc')
